name: Hope Sanchez
title: Hair Designer
specialties: Educational classes for stylists and barbers
bio:
With over a decade in the hair industry, I've built my career on passion, creativity, and a love for making people feel confident and beautiful. My goal is to create a welcoming space where every client feels pampered and valued.

I specialize in hair texture and hair replacement services(wigs) as well as cuts, colors & perms! I stay ahead of the latest trends in perming and texture, offering both transformative services and educational classes for fellow stylists and barbers looking to expand their skills.

Outside the salon, I'm a wife and mother of three children, balancing my career with family life. When I'm not behind the chair, you can find me lost in a good book (romance, horror, and thrillers) or binge-watching my favorite shows. All while sipping on some coffee. My work is more than just hair—it's about connection, self-care, and helping clients embrace their unique beauty.

Whether you're looking for a fresh color, a stunning perm, or just a relaxing escape (iced coffee included!), I'm here to bring your hair goals to life.
